chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 613 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 3628/16. 2. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2026 Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for applicant. This reference is pending since 2016 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On successive previous occasions, time was sought on behalf of the applicant’s counsel. Same is the case today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
